question_text: Shortness of breath or choking sensation?
Fear of dying or losing control?
New chest pain different than usual?
History of heart or lung disease?
Feeling down or hopeless most days?
Sleep problems (too much or too little)?
Plan or intent to harm yourself?
History of depression or bipolar disorder?
Recent major life stressor or loss?
Able to keep yourself safe right now?
Anxiety or racing thoughts at night?
Willing to try sleep hygiene changes?
